<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## Summary

What does this change do, and why?

## Linked issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run gate` passes locally (tsc + tests + boundaries + lint + docs:check + complexity:check)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it made sense

## Risk / notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to — behavior changes, trust-boundary
implications, follow-ups, or deliberate trade-offs.
